query: Blue Origin New Shepard pause flights redirect resources human lunar lander Artemis 2026

New Shepard is a reusable spaceflight system designed for vertical landings.Feb 10, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.astronomy.com/space-exploration/blue-origin-pauses-new-shepard-shoots-for-the-moon/#:~:text=Blue%20Origin%20announced%20on%20Jan,system%20designed%20for%20vertical%20landings.","title":"Blue Origin pauses New Shepard, shoots for the Moon","content":"30, 2026, that it will pause New Shepard flights for at least two years.
The company, owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos, is instead redirecting resources to lunar spaceflight.
New Shepard is a reusable spaceflight system designed for vertical landings.
It has completed 38 flights and carried 98 people above the Kármán line — the internationally recognized boundary of space at an altitude of 62 miles (100 kilometers).
And in April 2025, pop star Katy Perry flew on the NS-31 mission — a flight that featured the first all-female crew and included broadcast journalist Gayle King and Lauren Sánchez, now Bezos’ wife.
In October, Sean Duffy, serving as interim NASA administrator, announced the reopening of the Artemis 3 HLS contract."},{"url":"https://www.blueorigin.com/news/new-shepard-to-pause-flights","title":"Blue Origin to Pause New Shepard Flights for No Less Than Two Years | Blue Origin","content":"Blue Origin today announced it will pause its New Shepard flights and shift resources to further accelerate development of the company's human lunar capabilities."},{"url":"https://payloadspace.com/blue-pauses-space-tourism-to-focus-on-the-moon/","title":"Blue Origin Pauses Space Tourism to Focus On the Moon","content":"After 38 launches, including a mix of science payloads and 17 crewed flights, Blue announced Friday that it’s taking a step back from space tourism aboard New Shepard.
Instead, the company will focus on its lunar program.
“We will redirect our people and resources toward further acceleration of our human lunar capabilities inclusive of New Glenn,” Blue Origin CEO Dave Limp wrote in that email, per Ars.
Loft Orbital announced the purchase of new satellite bus inventory today designed to fly larger, more power hungry customer payloads."},{"url":"https://www.nprillinois.org/2026-01-30/blue-origin-pauses-space-tourism-flights-to-focus-on-lunar-lander","title":"Blue Origin pauses space tourism flights to focus on lunar lander | NPR Illinois","content":"Since then, Blue Origin has carried paying customers, along with some celebrity passengers like William Shatner, Katy Perry, Gayle King and Michael Strahan."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/cnn_blue-origin-announced-friday-that-it-is-pausing-activity-7423198622604890112-RIDl","title":"Blue Origin Pauses New Shepard Flights to Focus on Lunar Capabilities | CNN posted on the topic | LinkedIn","content":"Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said NASA may use Blue Origin’s lander for the Artemis III mission if SpaceX’s Starship is too far behind schedule.
Since its first crewed flight in July 2021, New Shepard has carried 98 people above the Kármán line on 10-minute suborbital hops.
With SpaceX facing delays on its Starship lander, Bezos sees a window to leapfrog his rival for Artemis-era dominance and that prize dwarfs anything the tourism business could deliver.
Jeff Bezos's space company Blue Origin said Friday it would temporarily pause flights of its space tourism rocket to focus more resources on its lunar ambitions.
Last year, the company founded by Amazon's Jeff Bezos successfully carried out two uncrewed orbital flights using its massive New Glenn rocket, which is significantly more powerful than New Shepard.
🌙SpaceX delays Mars mission to focus on the Moon 🖱 SpaceX has pushed back its planned 2026 Mars mission.
The company is now prioritizing a lunar mission for NASA, according to people familiar with the decision. 🖱 SpaceX is targeting March 2027 for an uncrewed Starship landing on the Moon.
Blue Origin, the company founded by Jeff Bezos, has announced a temporary pause in its space tourism flights with the New Shepard spacecraft."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Blue Origin New Shepard pause flights redirect resources human lunar lander Artemis 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.astronomy.com/space-exploration/blue-origin-pauses-new-shepard-shoots-for-the-moon","title":"Blue Origin pauses New Shepard, shoots for the Moon","content":"# Blue Origin pauses New Shepard, shoots for the Moon. Blue Origin pauses New Shepard flights for two years to focus on lunar goals, including its $3.4 billion Blue Moon lander and New Glenn rocket for NASA's Artemis. Blue Origin announced eight days later that they are temporarily pausing New Shepard flights to focus their efforts on lunar spaceflight. Blue Origin announced on Jan. 30, 2026, that it will pause New Shepard flights for at least two years. New Shepard is a reusable spaceflight system designed for vertical landings. Days after Blue Origin’s statement, Elon Musk announced a similar pivot for SpaceX. Blue Origin says that pausing New Shepard will allow it to shift focus to its lunar capabilities. In 2023, NASA selected Blue Origin for a $3.4 billion contract to develop the Blue Moon lander as the second human landing system provider for the Artemis program. It is designed to carry up to four astronauts to the moon’s surface and return them to lunar orbit.","score":0.9020676,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.blueorigin.com/news/new-shepard-to-pause-flights","title":"Blue Origin to Pause New Shepard Flights for No Less Than Two Years | Blue Origin","content":"Blue Origin: For The Benefit of Earth. # Blue Origin to Pause New Shepard Flights for No Less Than Two Years. Blue Origin today announced it will pause its New Shepard flights and shift resources to further accelerate development of the company's human lunar capabilities. The decision reflects Blue Origin's commitment to the nation's goal of returning to the Moon and establishing a permanent, sustained lunar presence. A note from CEO Dave Limp: On May 28, 2026, we experienced a significant anomaly during a New Glenn Integrated Launch Vehicle hotfire test. I want to provide you with an update on the remarkable recovery and rebuild efforts since that day, and our path forward to return to flight this year. We experienced an anomaly during a hotfire test on May 28, 2026. Blue Origin announced the launch date for New Glenn's third mission, slated to launch no earlier than Sunday, April 19, 2026. Sign up to receive updates on Blue Origin's announcements, launches, and opportunities.","score":0.8921218,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/NewsPhotogJonShaban/posts/blue-origin-redirects-resources-to-accelerate-lunar-human-landing-systemblue-ori/1499446022184141","title":"Blue... - Jonathan Shaban, Spectrum News 13 Photojournalist","content":"## Jonathan Shaban, Spectrum News 13 Photojournalist's Post. ### **Jonathan Shaban, Spectrum News 13 Photojournalist**. Blue Origin announced today that it will pause its New Shepard, flight operations, for no less than two years, and redirect resources to accelerate development of the company’s human lunar landing capabilities. The move underscores Blue Origin’s commitment to supporting the nation’s goal of returning astronauts to the Moon and establishing a sustained, long-term human presence on the lunar surface.
